title: teamcomm error codes
description: Numeric codes used in JSON-RPC `error.code` fields. Source of truth: crates/teamcomm-protocol/src/error.rs::ErrorCode.

oneOf.title: ParseError
oneOf.description: Invalid JSON was received by the server (JSON-RPC 2.0 §5.1).

oneOf.title: InvalidRequest
oneOf.description: The JSON sent is not a valid request object (JSON-RPC 2.0 §5.2).

oneOf.title: MethodNotFound
oneOf.description: The method does not exist or is not available (JSON-RPC 2.0 §5.3).

notes: teamcomm currently emits only the five JSON-RPC 2.0 standard codes.
Custom codes in the application range (-32000 to -32099) are reserved for future use but not yet emitted.
Codes outside the standard range (-32768 to -32000) and the application range are rejected by the parser.
